text:
There once was a bird who dreamt she was an opera singer. She trained her whole life. Every day she would practice singing. One day she slipped. She fell!

The bird turned herself into a tiny mouse. Now she could scamper around. She listened to people sing. She admired their voices. "Perhaps a whisper could lift me," she thought. She sang softly. People liked it. Stars listened!

One morning stars sang together. There was a pause. They listened. Then the stars sang louder. They lifted the tiny bird. They soared!

They danced through rivers of emerald-green. They sang under nightsky stars!
One day she sang just loud enough. People heard her. They gathered!

They organized an orchestra!

Together they sang! The bird soared high!

That's how she became the star soprano.

They danced all night.

And that went forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
